EEGPlacementScheme: ANT Neuro eego sports 64-channel cap based on the international 10-10 system; stored channel 31 is miscellaneous.
Notes: Stored channels are 0-30 and 32-63 EEG, 31 miscellaneous, 64 listening audio monitor, 65 speaking microphone monitor, 66 EOG, 67 upper-lip EMG, 68 lower-lip EMG, 69-87 and 89 miscellaneous auxiliary channels, and 88 trigger. EMG/EOG channels are stored after differential preprocessing.
